texto: Heroic ambition seemed to have been the cause of much of the world's pain then - quite like it is now. No villain ever saw himself a villain: he only saw himself a hero
autor: and this goes just as no hero ever saw himself a hero: he simply did what he had to do. No true hero initially sets out with intentions of being deemed a hero.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a and this goes just as no hero ever saw himself a hero: he simply did what he had to do. No true hero initially sets out with intentions of being deemed a hero.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Heroic ambition seemed to have been the cause of much of the world's pain then - quite like it is…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, criss-jami, villain pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
